notes: Generated in the parent thread using the built-in image generation tool.
Final board follows the existing vertical project character-board layout: three full-body states plus lower detail and material panels.

Visual identity preserves Xue Linqiang as a weather-bent old Grey Wall master around 50, with bone whistle, worn long spear, frost-cracked hands, coarse wall scarf, old iron buckles, snowline leg wraps, and inherited mismatched old armor plates.
The old Zhaoming reference appears only as a worn pressure trace on an inherited armor detail, not as a new or clean public badge.
No background Codex thread was created because this was a single-asset direct parent generation.
